info.title: WOS Public API
info.description: Public REST API contract for WOS case portal, workspec-server, and future SDK consumers.

get.summary: Fetch the committed OpenAPI contract snapshot.
List notifications visible to the caller.

parameters.name: includeRead
parameters.description: When true, include read notifications in addition to unread notifications.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque resume token from the previous page (ADR 0082 D-7).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum page size (ADR 0082 D-7).

get.summary: Get unread notification count visible to the caller.

post.summary: Mark one notification read.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Notification URN.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional idempotency key (ADR 0082 D-16). RECOMMENDED on naturally-idempotent mutations.

get.summary: List actors visible to the caller.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque resume token from the previous page (ADR 0082 D-7).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum page size (ADR 0082 D-7).

get.summary: Fetch a single actor by URN.

parameters.name: urn
parameters.description: WOS resource URN (ADR 0082 D-4).

get.summary: Fetch a durable case-ledger projection.
get.description: Case-level projection for ADR 0093 dual identity. The route is keyed by the durable case ledger and aggregates direct case-ledger provenance with every workflow process currently bound to that case. It does not authorize or perform post-ledger direct append.

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: Durable case-ledger TypeID or WOS resource URN.

200.description: Durable case-ledger projection with direct event summary and bound processes.

post.summary: Append a direct event to a durable case ledger.
post.description: Direct case-ledger append surface for ADR 0093. The reference server implements the pre-ledger `wos.kernel.case_created` genesis branch as a provenance-chain write without enqueueing or draining a workflow process. Registered post-ledger direct append event types invoke the relationship authorization port; the default resolver denies with 403, while configured allow decisions persist event-contract-valid append records the generic direct writer can validate. The concrete ReBAC/OpenFGA adapter remains open, and specialized events such as `wos.kernel.signature_affirmation` and `wos.governance.determination*` require their runtime adapters.

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: Durable case-ledger TypeID or WOS resource URN.

requestBody.description: Direct case-ledger event. `wos.kernel.case_created` opens a new ledger; registered post-ledger WOS events run relationship authorization and append only after an allow decision plus event-contract validation.

201.description: Provenance receipt for the appended genesis event.

get.summary: Capture WOS high-water marks and policy/config source digests for a case export.
get.description: WOS-side source fence for a case-export attempt (ADR 0093 D-1, sibling of `case-view`). Captures the current case-ledger and policy/config high-water marks at fence-acquisition time under the per-case mutation lease (`LeaseScope::WosCaseSource`); downstream Trellis publication binds its seal fence (`trellis-export-seal-fence-v1`, Trellis Core §18.3e) to these values. Lease-busy timeouts surface as `423 Locked` with closed code `WOS-1423` (idempotently retriable). See `specs/api/case-export-fence.md` for verifier obligations.

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: Durable case-ledger TypeID or WOS resource URN.

200.description: Case export fence with append-vector high-water marks and policy-snapshot source provenance, captured under a per-case mutation lease.

get.summary: List workflow processes bound to a durable case ledger.
get.description: Case/process read route for ADR 0093 dual identity. The route lists runtime workflow process projections whose `caseLedgerId` matches the supplied durable case ledger.

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: Durable case-ledger TypeID or WOS resource URN.

200.description: Workflow process projections bound to the supplied case ledger.

post.summary: Start a workflow process on a durable case ledger.
post.description: Case/process creation route for ADR 0093 dual identity. The route creates a new runtime process bound to the supplied durable case ledger; repeated calls can create multiple process IDs for the same case ledger.

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: Durable case-ledger TypeID or WOS resource URN.

requestBody.description: Workflow definition and optional initial case-state seed for the new process.

200.description: New workflow process projection bound to the supplied case ledger.

get.summary: Fetch one workflow process bound to a durable case ledger.
get.description: Case/process route for ADR 0093 dual identity. `case_id` identifies the durable case ledger; `process_id` identifies the runtime workflow process. The server returns 404 when the process exists but is not bound to the supplied case ledger.

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: Durable case-ledger TypeID or WOS resource URN.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: Workflow process TypeID or WOS resource URN bound to the case ledger.

200.description: Workflow process projection carrying both `caseLedgerId` and `processId`.

post.summary: Submit a workflow input to one process bound to a durable case ledger.
post.description: Workflow-submission route for ADR 0093 dual identity. This route validates the case/process binding before enqueuing the authored input for kernel evaluation. Direct case-ledger appends use the separate case event surface.

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: Durable case-ledger TypeID or WOS resource URN.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: Workflow process TypeID or WOS resource URN bound to the case ledger.

requestBody.description: Authored workflow input for kernel transition algorithm evaluation.

200.description: Kernel evaluation result after draining the submitted workflow input.

post.summary: Drain queued workflow inputs for one process bound to a durable case ledger.
post.description: Case/process route for ADR 0093 dual identity. This route validates the case/process binding before draining queued runtime events for the process.

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: Durable case-ledger TypeID or WOS resource URN.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: Workflow process TypeID or WOS resource URN bound to the case ledger.

200.description: Runtime drain step summaries for the process.

get.summary: Fetch the server-assembled adverse-decision explanation for a workflow process in a case ledger.

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: Durable case-ledger TypeID or WOS resource URN.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: Workflow process TypeID or WOS resource URN bound to the case ledger.

200.description: Server-assembled explanation per workflow-governance §3.8.1 deterministic algorithm.

get.summary: List provenance records for a workflow process in a case ledger.

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: Durable case-ledger TypeID or WOS resource URN.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: Workflow process TypeID or WOS resource URN bound to the case ledger.

200.description: Provenance records for the bound workflow process.

get.summary: List correspondence messages for a workflow process in a case ledger.
get.description: Case/process route for ADR 0093 dual identity. The server validates the case/process binding before listing the correspondence feed for the bound workflow process.

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: Durable case-ledger TypeID or WOS resource URN.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: Workflow process TypeID or WOS resource URN bound to the case ledger.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Filter by message direction.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by delivery status.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Filter by communication channel.

parameters.name: partyRole
parameters.description: Filter by party role.

parameters.name: occurredFrom
parameters.description: Inclusive UTC RFC 3339 lower bound for `occurredAt`.

parameters.name: occurredUntil
parameters.description: Exclusive UTC RFC 3339 upper bound for `occurredAt`.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque resume token from the previous page (ADR 0082 D-7).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum page size (ADR 0082 D-7).

200.description: Cursor-paginated correspondence message page scoped to the bound workflow process.

get.summary: List tasks for a workflow process in a case ledger.
get.description: Case/process route for ADR 0093 dual identity. The server validates the case/process binding before listing tasks for the bound workflow process.

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: Durable case-ledger TypeID or WOS resource URN.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: Workflow process TypeID or WOS resource URN bound to the case ledger.

parameters.name: assignedActor
parameters.description: Filter to tasks currently assigned to the supplied actor URN.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter to tasks in the supplied status (closed `TaskStatus` taxonomy).

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Filter to tasks of the supplied family.

parameters.name: deadlineBefore
parameters.description: Inclusive UTC RFC 3339 upper bound on `deadline`.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque resume token from the previous page (ADR 0082 D-7).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum page size (ADR 0082 D-7).

200.description: Cursor-paginated task page scoped to the bound workflow process.

get.summary: Fetch the holds subresource for a workflow process in a case ledger.
get.description: Case/process route for ADR 0093 dual identity. The server returns 404 when the process exists but is not bound to the supplied case ledger.

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: Durable case-ledger TypeID or WOS resource URN.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: Workflow process TypeID or WOS resource URN bound to the case ledger.

200.description: Hold entries for the bound workflow process.

post.summary: Migrate a workflow process in a durable case ledger.
post.description: Case/process route for ADR 0093 dual identity. The server validates the case/process binding before invoking workflow migration semantics for the bound process.

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: Durable case-ledger TypeID or WOS resource URN.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: Workflow process TypeID or WOS resource URN bound to the case ledger.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key (ADR 0082 D-16). Server retains the request/response pair for at least 24 hours keyed by `(idempotency-key, route, scope)`. A repeat with the same key but a different body for the same route/scope is rejected with `WOS-1409`.

requestBody.description: Migration target, typed `MigrationMap`, migrating actor, and rationale (Kernel S11.2).

200.description: Migration result with both `instanceMigrated` and `migrationPinChanged` Facts-tier record URNs.

post.summary: Suspend a workflow process in a durable case ledger.
post.description: Case/process lifecycle route for ADR 0093 dual identity. The server validates the case/process binding before moving the bound process to the suspended lifecycle state.

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: Durable case-ledger TypeID or WOS resource URN.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: Workflow process TypeID or WOS resource URN bound to the case ledger.

requestBody.description: Optional lifecycle rationale.

post.summary: Resume a workflow process in a durable case ledger.
post.description: Case/process lifecycle route for ADR 0093 dual identity. The server validates the case/process binding before moving the bound process back to the active lifecycle state.

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: Durable case-ledger TypeID or WOS resource URN.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: Workflow process TypeID or WOS resource URN bound to the case ledger.

requestBody.description: Optional lifecycle rationale.

post.summary: Terminate a workflow process in a durable case ledger.
post.description: Case/process lifecycle route for ADR 0093 dual identity. The server validates the case/process binding before moving the bound process to the terminal lifecycle state.

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: Durable case-ledger TypeID or WOS resource URN.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: Workflow process TypeID or WOS resource URN bound to the case ledger.

requestBody.description: Optional lifecycle rationale.

get.summary: List tasks visible to the caller (default scope: caller's inbox).

parameters.name: assignedActor
parameters.description: Filter to tasks currently assigned to the supplied actor URN. Defaults to the calling actor.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter to tasks in the supplied status (closed `TaskStatus`).

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Filter to tasks of the supplied family.

parameters.name: processId
parameters.description: Filter to tasks on the supplied workflow process.

parameters.name: workflowUrl
parameters.description: Filter to tasks on instances of the supplied Workflow Document.

parameters.name: deadlineBefore
parameters.description: Inclusive UTC RFC 3339 upper bound on `deadline`.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque resume token from the previous page (ADR 0082 D-7).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum page size (ADR 0082 D-7).

get.summary: Fetch a single task by URN.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: WOS resource URN (ADR 0082 D-4).

post.summary: Save a partial task response without committing it.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: WOS resource URN (ADR 0082 D-4).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional idempotency key (ADR 0082 D-16). RECOMMENDED on naturally-idempotent mutations.

requestBody.description: Partial response payload conforming to the task's pinned contract.

200.description: Updated task projection with `status == drafted` and refreshed `lastValidationOutcome`.

post.summary: Commit a task's final response (transitions the task to `submitted`).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: WOS resource URN (ADR 0082 D-4).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key (ADR 0082 D-16). Server retains the request/response pair for at least 24 hours keyed by `(idempotency-key, route, scope)`. A repeat with the same key but a different body for the same route/scope is rejected with `WOS-1409`.

requestBody.description: Final response payload, definition pin, and (when `kind == signature`) `signatureRef` URN.

post.summary: Decline a task without submitting a response (transitions the task to `dismissed`).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: WOS resource URN (ADR 0082 D-4).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional idempotency key (ADR 0082 D-16). RECOMMENDED on naturally-idempotent mutations.

requestBody.description: Closed-with-vendor-extension dismissal rationale and optional detail.

get.summary: List declared agents (cross-case authoritative `AgentView` projections).

parameters.name: workflowUrl
parameters.description: Filter to agents declared by the supplied workflow.

parameters.name: autonomyLevel
parameters.description: Filter by closed-with-vendor-extension autonomy level.

parameters.name: driftStatus
parameters.description: Filter by closed-with-vendor-extension drift status.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque resume token from the previous page (ADR 0082 D-7).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum page size (ADR 0082 D-7).

get.summary: Fetch a single agent declaration by URN.

parameters.name: urn
parameters.description: WOS resource URN (ADR 0082 D-4).

get.summary: List delegation records (cross-case authoritative `Delegation` shape).

parameters.name: delegatorUrn
parameters.description: Filter to delegations granted by this actor URN.

parameters.name: delegateeUrn
parameters.description: Filter to delegations received by this actor URN.

parameters.name: authority
parameters.description: Filter by closed-with-vendor-extension delegation authority kind.

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: When true, restrict to delegations whose `effectiveDate` is past, `expirationDate` is `never` or future, and which are not revoked.

parameters.name: workflowUrl
parameters.description: Filter to delegations whose `scope.caseTypes` intersect this workflow's case-type taxonomy (best-effort).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque resume token from the previous page (ADR 0082 D-7).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum page size (ADR 0082 D-7).

post.summary: Create a new delegation record.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key (ADR 0082 D-16). Server retains the request/response pair for at least 24 hours keyed by `(idempotency-key, route, scope)`. A repeat with the same key but a different body for the same route/scope is rejected with `WOS-1409`.

requestBody.description: Delegation creation request — server assigns URN and `createdAt`.

get.summary: Fetch a single delegation by URN.

parameters.name: urn
parameters.description: WOS resource URN (ADR 0082 D-4).

post.summary: Revoke a delegation (revoked records remain visible for audit).

parameters.name: urn
parameters.description: WOS resource URN (ADR 0082 D-4).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key (ADR 0082 D-16). Server retains the request/response pair for at least 24 hours keyed by `(idempotency-key, route, scope)`. A repeat with the same key but a different body for the same route/scope is rejected with `WOS-1409`.

requestBody.description: Free-text revocation rationale; server stamps `revokedAt`/`revokedBy`.

get.summary: List policy parameter versions for a workflow.

parameters.name: policyUrl
parameters.description: URL-encoded workflow URL (governance §S13).

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: When true, restrict to the version whose effective period covers the request date. When false, restrict to historical versions.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque resume token from the previous page (ADR 0082 D-7).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum page size (ADR 0082 D-7).

200.description: Cursor-paginated policy version page (default ordering: `effectiveFrom` descending).

get.summary: Fetch a single policy parameter version.

parameters.name: policyUrl
parameters.description: URL-encoded workflow URL.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Stable policy version label (`PolicyVersion.version`).

get.summary: List correspondence messages visible to the caller.

parameters.name: processId
parameters.description: Filter to correspondence on this workflow process URN.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Filter by message direction.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by delivery status.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Filter by communication channel.

parameters.name: partyRole
parameters.description: Filter by party role.

parameters.name: occurredFrom
parameters.description: Inclusive UTC RFC 3339 lower bound for `occurredAt`.

parameters.name: occurredUntil
parameters.description: Exclusive UTC RFC 3339 upper bound for `occurredAt`.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque resume token from the previous page (ADR 0082 D-7).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum page size (ADR 0082 D-7).

post.summary: Record a correspondence message.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key (ADR 0082 D-16). Server retains the request/response pair for at least 24 hours keyed by `(idempotency-key, route, scope)`. A repeat with the same key but a different body for the same route/scope is rejected with `WOS-1409`.

requestBody.description: Correspondence message recording payload — server assigns URN and `recordedAt`.

get.summary: Fetch a single correspondence message by URN.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: WOS resource URN (ADR 0082 D-4).

post.summary: Render a delivery-sidecar notification template into a correspondence draft.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional idempotency key (ADR 0082 D-16). RECOMMENDED on naturally-idempotent mutations.

requestBody.description: Template reference plus closed-shape variable set.

200.description: Rendering artifact. Subsequent `POST /correspondence` MAY commit it via `renderingId`.

get.summary: Fetch a previously-produced correspondence rendering.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: WOS resource URN (ADR 0082 D-4).

get.summary: List business calendar date classifications for a calendar.

parameters.name: calendarId
parameters.description: Delivery sidecar calendar identifier.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Inclusive ISO 8601 lower bound on the calendar window.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Inclusive ISO 8601 upper bound on the calendar window.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque resume token from the previous page (ADR 0082 D-7).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum page size (ADR 0082 D-7).

get.summary: List report runs visible to the caller (newest-first by `queuedAt`).

parameters.name: reportType
parameters.description: Filter by closed-with-vendor-extension report type.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by closed report run status.

parameters.name: submittedBy
parameters.description: Filter by submitter actor URN.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque resume token from the previous page (ADR 0082 D-7).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum page size (ADR 0082 D-7).

post.summary: Queue a new report run.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key (ADR 0082 D-16). Server retains the request/response pair for at least 24 hours keyed by `(idempotency-key, route, scope)`. A repeat with the same key but a different body for the same route/scope is rejected with `WOS-1409`.

requestBody.description: Closed discriminated input keyed by `reportType`.

get.summary: Fetch a single report run envelope.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: WOS resource URN (ADR 0082 D-4).

get.summary: List a succeeded report run's result rows (cursor-paginated).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: WOS resource URN (ADR 0082 D-4).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque resume token from the previous page (ADR 0082 D-7).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum page size (ADR 0082 D-7).

post.summary: Cancel a pending or running report run.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: WOS resource URN (ADR 0082 D-4).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional idempotency key (ADR 0082 D-16). RECOMMENDED on naturally-idempotent mutations.

requestBody.description: Optional cancellation rationale.

200.description: Updated report run (terminal `cancelled` status, or unmodified terminal run on idempotent retry).

get.summary: Stream a succeeded report run's results in the requested format.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: WOS resource URN (ADR 0082 D-4).

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Output format. Defaults to `json` when omitted (closed-with-vendor-extension `ReportOutputFormat`).

200.description: Streamed report run results in the requested format.

get.summary: Composed dashboard rollup (lifecycle, SLA breaches, recent activity).

parameters.name: until

parameters.name: tenantScope

parameters.name: tenantScope

parameters.name: tenantScope

parameters.name: limit

parameters.name: includeRead

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque resume token from the previous page (ADR 0082 D-7).

parameters.name: limit

post.summary: Issue a bearer token for a credential.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key (ADR 0082 D-16). Server retains the request/response pair for at least 24 hours keyed by `(idempotency-key, route, scope)`. A repeat with the same key but a different body for the same route/scope is rejected with `WOS-1409`.

requestBody.description: Login credential payload (closed-with-vendor-extension `LoginKind`).

200.description: Login response (bearer token or pending MFA challenge).

post.summary: Revoke session tokens (this session, or all sessions).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional idempotency key (ADR 0082 D-16). RECOMMENDED on naturally-idempotent mutations.

requestBody.description: Closed-no-extension logout scope.

204.description: Logout complete; bearer token (and dependents per scope) revoked.

post.summary: Refresh a bearer token using the refresh token.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional idempotency key (ADR 0082 D-16). RECOMMENDED on naturally-idempotent mutations.

requestBody.description: Opaque refresh token to redeem.

post.summary: Swap the authenticated session's scope (within the current tenant).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key (ADR 0082 D-16). Server retains the request/response pair for at least 24 hours keyed by `(idempotency-key, route, scope)`. A repeat with the same key but a different body for the same route/scope is rejected with `WOS-1409`.

requestBody.description: Target scope tuple (Tenant -> Organization -> Workspace? -> Environment).

200.description: Re-issued bearer token bound to the new scope.

get.summary: Introspect the bearer token presented on the request.
Fetch the active scope context for the bearer token.
List case-export bundles.

parameters.name: processId
parameters.description: Filter to bundles for one workflow process URN.

parameters.name: lifecycleStateAtExport
parameters.description: Filter on the lifecycle state captured at export time.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter on the closed bundle status.

parameters.name: createdAfter
parameters.description: Inclusive UTC RFC 3339 lower bound on `requestedAt`.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque resume token from the previous page (ADR 0082 D-7).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum page size (ADR 0082 D-7).

post.summary: Kick off a case-export bundle build.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key (ADR 0082 D-16). Server retains the request/response pair for at least 24 hours keyed by `(idempotency-key, route, scope)`. A repeat with the same key but a different body for the same route/scope is rejected with `WOS-1409`.

requestBody.description: Bundle build request — server emits Trellis events as the build progresses.

get.summary: Fetch a bundle's metadata envelope (never the byte stream).

parameters.name: urn
parameters.description: WOS resource URN (ADR 0082 D-4).

get.summary: Stream the Trellis-emitted CBOR bundle archive (`trellis-export/1`).

parameters.name: urn
parameters.description: WOS resource URN (ADR 0082 D-4).

200.description: Trellis-emitted CBOR export archive byte stream (`trellis-export/1`).

post.summary: Submit a cross-case audit query.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional idempotency key (ADR 0082 D-16). RECOMMENDED on naturally-idempotent mutations.

requestBody.description: Cross-case audit query parameters. `Idempotency-Key` REQUIRED when `materialize: true` (ADR 0082 D-16).

200.description: Audit query result envelope (synchronous first page when `materialize: false`; queued query handle otherwise).

get.summary: Fetch the current status (and first page) of a materialized audit query.

parameters.name: queryId
parameters.description: Server-issued opaque audit query identifier.

200.description: Audit query result envelope with current `status` and first result page.

get.summary: Paginate a materialized audit query's result set.

parameters.name: queryId
parameters.description: Server-issued opaque audit query identifier.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque resume token from the previous page (ADR 0082 D-7).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum page size (ADR 0082 D-7).

200.description: Audit query result page (available only when `status == succeeded`).

get.summary: Fetch a single provenance record cross-case under audit scope.

parameters.name: provenanceUrn
parameters.description: Provenance record URN.

get.summary: Fetch a single appeal by URN.

parameters.name: appealId
parameters.description: Appeal URN.

get.summary: Fetch a single signature ceremony by URN.

parameters.name: ceremonyId
parameters.description: Signature ceremony URN.
